title: Terms
content: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy coming soon.

title: Purchasing Rainbow Marks Photoraphy
content:
If you're interested in purchasing some of our work reach out and let us know. We currently don't have an e-commerce option here on the website, but can gladly get you squared away via PayPal or Venmo.

Individual Photo: $25

All photos from one individual at an event: $60

Copyright: Purchasing our photos will get you a non-watermarked photo for personal use. Commercial use options are available on a case by case basis.

Reach out to me via my personal [contact page](https://chrishammond.com/Contact), we'll ask you details about event and individual so we can determine which photo(s) you want.

title: About
content: Rainbow Marks is Chris Hammond. The name Rainbow Marks comes from Rainbow Landmarks. One of the first great (if we do say so ourselves) photos we took as we got more seriously into photography was the shot above of the Sydney Opera House on a trip to Australia in 2012. The double rainbow presented itself over the harbor and we couldn't resist running around to get the perfect angle on the Opera House. A couple of years later, while visiting San Francisco, we happened to catch a rainbow over the Golden Gate Bridge. The combination of these two events and the works produced gave us the name to use for our photography business. We hope you enjoy our work. We are not typically available for hire, but if you're interested in having us at an event, you might be able to twist our arms. We hope you enjoy our work.
